title: El crimen de Oribe
director: Leopoldo Torre Nilsson, Leopoldo Torres Ríos
writer: Adolfo Bioy Casares, Arturo Cerretani, Leopoldo Torre Nilsson
actors: Roberto Escalada, Carlos Thompson, Raúl De Lange
plot: A journalist José Luis Villafane travels to a little town. A problem with your car forced him to stay in a hotel, where they share the room with Carlos Oribe, a copycat poet.
